ground_truth:
But two watching figures have not been fooled by the Joker's clever ruse. Hurry! Those clocks are wrong -- they're running backwards!
Another of the Joker's reverse tricks! Watch that crowd! He's in there some place... Please let us pass! This man is ill!
That invalid in the wheelchair -- his shoes are dusty, he's been walking. He's a fake!  Batman's hunch is right, for suddenly...
Quick! Now's our chance. Now to start the Western Flier -- in reverse! It's a swell way to open up that locked gold car! Next time you play invalid, Joker, wipe the dust off your shoes!
And next time you play detective --
Another reversed crime! First the news story... then the getaway... and now he'll return to steal the gold!
What's all the fuss about down there?
